title: Aurum Bestiary
body:
**Adds mobs and their drops!**

Mobs aren't really related to eachother, but they do have unique interactions and useful drops!

**Specifically adds:**

- 5 Mobs
- 4 Pieces of gear
- 3 Food items
- Mob drops and ingredients

**(More on that in the gallery)**

It'll be more fun and demonstrative if you discover the properties of mobs and items yourself, it's not that hard! All mod features can be found in it's respective creative tab (or in JEI).

Please use **JEI** or a similar mod for recipes

_Updates are planned_
